evals.prompt: Open the web and research the current state of the electric scooter market in detail this month.
evals.expected_output: A synthesized, source-linked overview of the market covering recent developments, organized by sub-topic, with dates noted.
expectations: Performs actual web searches and fetches sources rather than stopping at tool selection
Uses multiple distinct queries / angles, not a single search
Delivers a synthesized answer with cited source links and notes how current the data is

evals.prompt: Research what this company has announced recently and summarize the key points.
evals.expected_output: A short cited summary of recent announcements drawn from fetched sources.
expectations: Distinguishes facts found in sources from inference
Provides links to the sources used
Ends the turn with a delivered summary, not an in-progress tool call
